string.text: "Locked In": Escape the laboratory.
What the hell?! How did I end up here?! I need to find a way out.
"Radio Interference": Ask stalkers.
"Radio Interference": Find .
"Radio Interference": Ask stalkers.
"Radio Interference": Ask stalkers.
I managed to catch a distress signal from some stalkers, I need to ask the stalkers, maybe they know something.
I managed to catch a distress signal from some stalkers, I need to ask the stalkers, maybe they know something.
I managed to catch a distress signal from some stalkers, I need to ask the stalkers, maybe they know something.
I managed to catch a distress signal from some stalkers, I need to ask the stalkers, maybe they know something.
"In Search of Myself": Understand what happened?
Something's wrong here... How did I end up here? And where is my gear?!
"By Chance": Wait for a message from Gloomy.
"By Chance": Return to Gloomy.
My head feels like a bowling ball, but my arms and legs are intact, so I guess I’ll live. Gloomy told me to take a break, so I’ll do that.
Quite an interesting area, strange though that I've never heard of it... Well, I need to head to Gloomy, looks like it's time to get to work.
"Nikrasov": Find Nikrasov.
"Nikrasov": Return to Gloomy.
Not an easy task. I think I should first explore the village, and then go from there.
My sixth sense didn't fail me, this Nikrasov was in one of the basements of the houses. I need to return to Gloomy and give him the find.
"Stalker Trust": Meet with the leader of the Stalkers.
"Stalker Trust": Report the result.
The conversation seemed good, but the stalkers are a bit uneasy, as simple dislike wouldn't explain this behavior. I think I should ask Gloomy about it, as well as report the result.
Once again, the errand boy, but this is just the beginning. I need to meet with the stalker leader and hand over the PDA, and also try to negotiate some cooperation.
"Oddities": Meet with Sapsan.
The leader of the local stalkers got in touch and wants to talk. Strange, since they're at odds with us.
"Kill Order": Eliminate Vint's group.
"Kill Order": Inspect the bodies.
"Kill Order": Report the findings.
A kill order has been placed for a group of bandits led by someone named Vint. The deadline for the order is one day.
It’s worth searching the bodies; they may have something useful.
In Vint’s backpack, I found a folder with documents and a PDA. I should investigate this, but first, I need to report the find to Gloomy.
"Just Asking": Talk to Sapsan.
Yeah... Now I need to find those damn documents, but first, I should talk to Sapsan. He and his group have been living here for a while and probably know something.
"Order": Talk to Gloomy.
Gloomy says there’s an order. I need to find out the details.
"Free Helper": Talk to the squad leader.
"Free Helper": Follow the group.
"Free Helper": Talk to Joker.
"Free Helper": Eliminate the enemy.
"Free Helper": Talk to Joker.
A group has contacted us asking for help. I need to find out what exactly they want.
From my conversation with Joker, it’s clear they plan to capture an old factory, and my task is to assist them in this.
Check on their readiness.
I need to eliminate the enemy squads that have occupied the factory.
The enemy has been eliminated, and the factory is now under the control of "Freedom." I need to talk to Joker and collect my reward.
"Free Science": Find the scanners.
"Free Science": Find a way to open the door.
"Free Science": Open the door.
"Free Science": Take the scanners.
"Free Science": Return to Joker.
I need to find the scanners in the old administrative building.
The doors are locked, I need to find the keys.
I have the keys, now it's just a matter of opening the door.
Take the scanners.
Deliver the scanners to Joker.
"Spatial Anomaly": Find the radio frequency scanner.
"Spatial Anomaly": Scan the area.
"Spatial Anomaly": Decode the collected data.
"Spatial Anomaly": Wait for the decoding.
"Spatial Anomaly": Retrieve the information.
"Spatial Anomaly": Send the exit coordinates.
"Spatial Anomaly": Report completion.
I need to find a radio-frequency scanner, the local technician should have one.
Alright, I have the scanner, now I just need to scan the area, and we'll see what comes up.
Okay, the data is collected, but I need to decode it to read it. I should head to the technician; he can help with this.
Now, I just need to wait...
The technician sent a message saying the decoding is complete; I need to pick up the data.
I have the data, now I just need to send it to the stalkers.
The data has been sent, and the stalkers are on their way to freedom. Now, I need to inform Sapsan and collect the reward.
"Rest": Go to sleep.
The easiest thing now is to go to sleep since there’s still a lot to do...
"Exodus": Meet with Yeger.
Yeger sent a message, saying he urgently wants to meet.
"The Thugs": Return to Sapsan.
"The Thugs": Take the gear from Diesel.
"The Thugs": Eliminate the assault squad.
"The Thugs": Search the bodies.
"The Thugs": Return to Sapsan.
Sapsan seems scared of something, I think it's best to return to him and find out what happened.
Sapsan signed my death warrant... But I can't refuse, I remember that group. Alright, I need to take the gear from Diesel and go...
I have the gear, but something tells me that all is not right with this squad, and Diesel says their leader is some kind of "Mrakobes." I've heard that name before...
It’s worth searching the bodies, I might find something useful.
Sapsan seems quite agitated, I should return to the camp quickly.
"The End": Talk to Kareglaza.
It’s time to take matters into my own hands...
"Other's Achievements": Check the tips.
"Other's Achievements": Deliver the found item.
"Other's Achievements": Wait.
"Other's Achievements": Talk to Vasilisk.
I should check the locations marked by Vasilisk, I might find something there.
I found a flash drive, but it's locked. I should take it to Vasilisk, and we'll see what happens.
Vasilisk said he would give the flash drive to Diesel for unlocking. I should wait.
Looks like something urgent. I should talk to Vasilisk as soon as possible.
"Search Location"
One of the locations marked by Vasilisk.
"Old Friend": Meet with Sapsan.
Sapsan contacted me and says he has a job for me. I should meet with him.
"Back to the Past": Question the locals.
"Back to the Past": Return to Sapsan.
I need to question the locals, maybe they know where to find this "Representative."
I have the coordinates of this "Representative," I think it's time to return to Sapsan. But maybe I should talk to him myself first?
"In the Web of Lies": Find the group of stalkers.
"In the Web of Lies": Check the tip.
"In the Web of Lies": Return to Spider.
"In the Web of Lies": Find Spider.
I need to find the group of stalkers who took some device from the laboratory. I think I should contact Sapsan.
Khmury gave me a lead on the approximate location of the group I'm looking for, I need to go check it out.
The group is dead and they don't have the device, looks like someone beat me to it. However, the PDA notes suggest otherwise. I need to return to Spider.
I knew it wasn’t all smooth here... He set me up, I need to find him. He probably went down into the laboratory.
"Radio Silence": Meet with Sapsan.
"Radio Silence": Find the missing group.
"Radio Silence": Return to Sapsan.
"Radio Silence": Wait.
"Radio Silence": Talk to Sapsan.
"Radio Silence": Find the killer.
The leader of the stalkers contacted me and said he has a job for me. I should talk to him.
My task is to find a group of stalkers who haven't been in contact for a while. I think I should check their campsite that Sapsan marked.
I found the group, but they are all dead, looks like a pro was at work. However, I found a PDA in one of the bodies. I should show this to Sapsan.
I gave the PDA to Sapsan, he said I should wait. While I have time, I should visit Vasilisk, he has something for me.
While I was setting up the scanners, Sapsan contacted me and asked me to return quickly. I shouldn’t delay.
I'm glad Sapsan isn’t a fool, otherwise, I’d be walking in hell by now. Alright, I need to find this killer.
"Abnormal Activity": Set up scanners.
"Abnormal Activity": Return for the reward.
Vasilisk gave me some routine work, I think while I’m doing this, the stalker’s PDA will be unlocked.
All the scanners are set up. I need to return to Vasilisk and collect the rest of the reward.
"In the Labyrinth": Meet with Sapsan.
Sapsan is the key, literally, to completing the main job! I need to hurry to him.
"Nothing Personal": Pick up the gear.
"Nothing Personal": Meet with the mercenary leader.
"Nothing Personal": Report the situation to Sapsan.
Before heading out, I need to visit the local technician to pick up the gear.
Well, it seems to fit okay, now I can go check out these mercenaries.
The mercenaries explained the situation that happened, and I’m inclined to believe them, I need to tell Sapsan about this.
"Easy Money": Talk to Khmury.
"Easy Money": Lure Yeger out.
"Easy Money": Kill Yeger.
"Easy Money": Follow Yeger.
"Easy Money": Deliver the documents and collect the reward.
Looks like Khmury has a job for me, I think I should go talk to him.
Well... Khmury sure gave me a headache, now I need to figure out how to lure that damn Yeger out of the camp.
Alright, it’s quiet here now, time to kill him...
Follow Yeger.
I got lucky, the documents were in Yeger's personal belongings, now I can return to Khmury.
"Humanity": Meet with Kareglaza.
Money is one thing, but I still need to be human, I’ll take these things to the sister of the deceased and leave the ZONE with a clear conscience.
"The Tempting Client": Meet with Quiet.
During a conversation with Sapsan, I learned about a stalker named Quiet, and as Sapsan said, he’s been looking for me and is now at the camp. I should talk to him.
"Detective, part-time": Find the scout named Petrukha.
"Detective, part-time": Find a way to unlock the PDA.
"Detective, part-time": Wait for the PDA to be unlocked.
"Detective, part-time": Retrieve the PDA from Diesel.
"Detective, part-time": Explore the area around the tunnel with the "Zarkas".
"Detective, part-time": Return to Tikhiy.
As Tikhiy said, the incident happened recently. The trail is still fresh, so it's worth inspecting the place where the attack occurred, and from there, we'll figure out the next step.

At the site of the massacre, there were still snorks, but that's only part of the problem. The main issue is that the scout's PDA is locked. I think Diesel will be able to unlock it. It's worth talking to him about it.
We need to wait until Diesel unlocks Petrukha's PDA.
Diesel reported that the PDA is unlocked and can be retrieved.
The PDA contained a lot of information, but the most important thing is that we now have a lead on where to find Petrukha. We need to head north to the tunnel with the "Zarkas".
That's it, now we can return to Tikhiy for the reward.
"Strike to the Eyes": Eliminate the stalker.
"Strike to the Eyes": Return for the reward.
Sapsan is concerned about a stalker who periodically walks near the camp. According to Sapsan, this stalker is somehow connected to the bandits. He needs to be eliminated.
The stalker and the "Bandit" group have been eliminated. Now we need to collect the reward.
"Ammunition is a Matter of Principle": Find the missing squad.
"Ammunition is a Matter of Principle": Return for the reward.
As Sapsan said, his reconnaissance squad went missing in the swamp area, we need to find them.
The reconnaissance squad is dead, but some equipment could be salvaged. We need to return to Sapsan.
"It Smells Like Kerosene": Retrieve the package.
"It Smells Like Kerosene": Return for the reward.
As Diesel said, I need to retrieve the "Package" and deliver it to him.
The package is with me, now I can return to Diesel.
"Amber Values": Retrieve the package.
"Amber Values": Return for the reward.
The courier job is quite simple, just pick up and deliver. Nothing complicated.
The package from Yantar is with me, now I need to head to Vasilisk.
"Legend": Find the military suit.
"Legend": Deliver the found item.
The suit should be searched for in the den, which is west of the swamp.
Deliver the found item and receive the reward.
"New Inhabitants": Retrieve the order from Vasilisk.
"New Inhabitants": Deliver the order to Joker.
Joker assigned me to pick up the order from Vasilisk.
The order is with me, now I can return to Joker.
"Real Guy": Find the stash of the gangsters.
"Real Guy": Deliver the stash.
Vint says that his "friend" hid a stash somewhere in the factory, but where exactly?
The stash is with me, but should I return it to Vint or deliver it to the stalkers...
"Old Friend": Meet with Khmury.
Khmury has made contact. I hope he has something worthwhile for me.
"Kolobok": Find the Artifact
You need to find the Artifact - "Kolobok", it is likely in the acidic anomalies.
"Kolobok": Deliver the Artifact to the Client
The Artifact has been found, now it needs to be delivered to the client.
"Chunk of Meat": Find the Artifact
You need to find the Artifact - "Chunk of Meat", it is likely in the acidic anomalies.
"Chunk of Meat": Deliver the Artifact to the Client
The Artifact has been found, now it needs to be delivered to the client.
"Cristal": Find the Artifact
You need to find the Artifact - "Cristal", it is likely in the thermal anomalies.
"Cristal": Deliver the Artifact to the Client
The Artifact has been found, now it needs to be delivered to the client.
"Moonlight": Find the Artifact
You need to find the Artifact - "Moonlight", it is likely in the electrical anomalies.
"Moonlight": Deliver the Artifact to the Client
The Artifact has been found, now it needs to be delivered to the client.
"Project Prometheus": Wait for the signal from Khmury.
"Project Prometheus": Talk to Khmury.
"Project Prometheus": Obtain the keycard.
"Project Prometheus": Return to Khmury.
"Project Prometheus": Descend into the laboratory.
"Project Prometheus": Investigate the complex.
"Project Prometheus": ...
Khmury said something grand is coming, and I need to wait for his signal.
Here's the signal! I need to hurry and head to Khmury.
I need to obtain the keycard. To get it, I must complete a task for Sapsan.
I have the keycard, now I need to return to Khmury.
Descend into the laboratory.
There were no soldiers of Khmury at the location, and Khmury is in panic. However, we're almost at our goal, so we need to continue and investigate the complex.
What? WHAT!?
Check the area for mutants.
Khmury assigned me to check a location for a dangerous mutant that has already taken down a couple of his soldiers. I should go there.
Kill the creature.
I need to kill this creature urgently before it does the same to me!
Report to Khmury about the completion.
I need to urgently return to the camp and tell Khmury what I did.
